title: The Palace Turns Uneasy
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Narrator, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, Fukaboshi, King Neptune. The core story beat is the palace turns uneasy.
scene: The scene centers on the palace turns uneasy, with Narrator, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, Fukaboshi, King Neptune driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yep, it's this way... the smell of tasty food...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahh.....! The smell disappeared!! It must be behind that door!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The average number

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ooh... Ahh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Could this be the entrance to the banquet Hall?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He said zero was here already, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but this door is pretty huge and thick...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And the wall looks pretty tough, as well. It's like the walls in Impel down!! Just how tasty is the stuff in here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa! It's pitch- black!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I guess this isn't the banquet hall...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But there is plenty of tasty- smelling food...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Is this likea big pantry, then? Oh, whatever! I'll just take some!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm too hungry to care!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa!! What is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...there sure is a lot of coral around on this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's this stuff?! It's so so soooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooft!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UU.....UHHHANN NANN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm? Did I just hear someone's voice?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahahah! This coral is like jelly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AAHH...!! I - is somebody there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoo oooaa haha!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WH - WHAT WERE YOU DOING ON TOP OF MY BODY...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HAA HAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ung H4!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: princess of the rylugu kingdom PRINCES SHIRAHOSH (giant waiting mermaid)

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Princess of the ryluguu kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who exactly might you be?! I - Identify yourself...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: whoaaaaa...!! It's a giant person... I mean, Merma AAAAID!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you here to make an attempt on my life as well?! W - well, I'm not scared of you at all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: I am the daughter of King Neptunee!!! Why should I be...

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Somebody!!! Father!!! Brotheeeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoooa, whoooa!! I haven't done anything!!!

summary: The Palace Turns Uneasy. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
